commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: walketh: Who goes about in the midst of you, and searches the hearts and the reins of all. <a

commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: stars: That is, Who has you in His right hand, and seeks you by His power.

commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: Ephesus: Part of this Church he blames, and part he praises, according to the character of the name. For Ephesus is said to be interpreted, "a great fall," as well as "my will in it."

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
